description: Golden trace for KeywordOverlapAnalyzerAgent — regression reference for DB write pattern and match counting

notes.data_source: Pure SQL + Python string matching — no LLM, no external API
notes.db_read_1: SELECT id, keyword FROM keywords WHERE status = 'validated'
notes.db_read_2: SELECT id, url, body FROM competitor_content WHERE body IS NOT NULL
notes.db_write: UPDATE competitor_content SET keywords_overlap = CAST(:overlap AS jsonb) WHERE id = :id
notes.keywords_overlap_type: JSONB array of matched keyword strings (not int — stores full match detail)

competitor_content_rows.body: We use AI marketing to grow our brand with seo automation.
Our content strategy focuses on organic search.

edge_cases.no_validated_keywords: Returns success with total_analyzed=0 and message field
edge_cases.no_content_with_body: Returns success with total_analyzed=0 and message field
edge_cases.zero_match_row: Still writes empty array [] to keywords_overlap — no rows silently skipped
edge_cases.case_insensitive: Body 'AI MARKETING is trending' matches keyword 'ai marketing'
